title: Vanilla | Reconsidered
description: Vanilla experience enchanced with little tweaks while keeping the vanilla aspect of the game! Now with 1.21.1 Support!
body:
![Big Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ee8e3128cb7ef3ddc1d9c9676d17b2970e5c0f9.png)

**Vanilla | Reconsidered** is a Minecraft modpack designed to enhance the classic vanilla experience while preserving its core essence. This modpack introduces subtle yet impactful changes that enrich gameplay, making it more immersive and engaging without straying too far from the original feel of Minecraft.

![Big Features!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26045a26fff4ba892aed8ed826ff5c915c155e77.png)

- 📕 **Enhanced Visuals**: Improved textures and lighting effects that make the world more vibrant and realistic.
  
- 🛠️ **Quality of Life Improvements**: Small tweaks and additions that streamline gameplay, such as better armor management and a more intuitive GUI experience.
  
- 🍃 **Enchanced Terrain Generation**: New biomes that fit the vanilla style exceptionally well with the help of [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic). _(If you dont want custom biomes dowload the **NT** labeled versions of the modpack)_
  
- 👍 **Balanced Gameplay**: Carefully curated mods that enhance the game without making it feel too easy or too difficult.

- 👥 **Play With Your Friends**: With the [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) mod you can play with your friends without even having to host a minecraft server! ( _Fixed in versions 2.3 and up!_ )

- **Supported Platforms**
 
  ✅MacOS
 
  ✅Windows
 
  ✅Linux-Debian
 
  ✅Arch-Linux
 
  ✅Any Linux Distro

- **Support The Development!** : [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/probablyari)
